scenes.narration: Yaar, Amazon ne mujhe Tree Traversal: Inorder / Preorder / Postorder pe yahi question poocha tha — 90% log yahi galat dete hain.

The core mechanism of Tree Traversal: Inorder / Preorder / Postorder: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
